name: frontend-e2e
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project frontend-e2e --web

options.command: node scripts/ensure-local-e2e-before-playwright.js && E2E_AUTH_SECRET=e2e-local-secret BACKEND_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 npx playwright test -c apps/frontend-e2e/playwright.config.ts apps/frontend-e2e/src/core-regression.spec.ts apps/frontend-e2e/src/core-regression-ui.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1

node scripts/ensure-local-e2e-before-playwright.js && E2E_AUTH_SECRET=e2e-local-secret BACKEND_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 npx playwright test -c apps/frontend-e2e/playwright.config.ts apps/frontend-e2e/src/screens/ apps/frontend-e2e/src/core-regression.spec.ts apps/frontend-e2e/src/core-regression-ui.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1

node scripts/ensure-local-e2e-before-playwright.js && E2E_AUTH_SECRET=e2e-local-secret BACKEND_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 npx playwright test -c apps/frontend-e2e/playwright.config.ts apps/frontend-e2e/src/visual-review.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1
